observed.error: Prisma error P2023: invalid UUID value for user.id or companion_profiles.id (user-companion/profile-001)
observed.details: Error creating UUID, invalid character found at position 1

observed.reason: Seed data creation failed due to invalid UUID values

cleanup.details: No rows created due to seed failure

failures.reason: Seed data invalid: user.id and companion_profiles.id are not UUIDs, and user seed is missing required fields (name, nickname).
failures.evidence: Prisma P2023 invalid UUID error on create

finalSummary: Test failed during setup because seed data uses non-UUID identifiers and omits required user fields, so API step could not be executed.
